description.value: When another member of the unit is killed or taken out of action, the Battle-Brother may take a Full Action and spend a Fate Point to call his remaining brothers to revenge the fallen. The character may raise his weapon in defiance and speak an oath of hatred, or recite one of the canticles of vengeance.

system.benefit: No matter how it is embodied, the Battle-Brother's action restores him and all those in Support Range to their starting Cohesion.

specialAbilities.name: Vengeance Rally
specialAbilities.description: When a squad member is killed, spend a Full Action and a Fate Point to restore all allies in Support Range to starting Cohesion.
